title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions!
